# Brian Ward Appraisal

> San Diego certified residential real estate appraiser with 22 years of experience and over 7,000 appraisals completed. Specializing in date of death appraisals, step-up in basis tax valuations, divorce, bankruptcy, estate, and pre-purchase/pre-sale appraisals. Qualified expert witness for litigation, divorce, and bankruptcy matters.

## Business Information

- Name: Brian Ward Appraisal
- Phone: (888) 844-1733
- Email: contact@brianward.com
- Website: https://www.brianward.com
- Address: 15877 Paseo Del Sur, San Diego, CA 92127
- Service Area: San Diego County and Western Riverside County, California
- Price Range: $299 - $725

## Appraisal Services

- [Date of Death Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/date-of-death-appraisal.html): Retrospective valuations for IRS step-up in basis, estate tax, and probate
- [Divorce Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/divorce-appraisal.html): Property valuations for equitable division in divorce proceedings
- [Bankruptcy Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/bankruptcy-appraisal.html): Valuations for Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filings
- [Estate Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/estate-appraisal.html): Valuations for estate planning, probate, and trust administration
- [Tax Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/tax-appraisal.html): Valuations for property tax appeals and IRS compliance
- [Pre-Purchase Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/pre-purchase-appraisal.html): Independent valuations before buying a home
- [Pre-Sale Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/pre-sale-appraisal.html): Valuations to establish listing price before selling
- [Family Transaction Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/family-transaction-appraisal.html): Fair market value for sales between family members
- [Insurance Dispute Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/insurance-appraisal.html): Valuations for insurance claim disputes
- [PMI Removal](https://www.brianward.com/pmi-removal.html): Appraisals to remove private mortgage insurance
- [Bonds Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/bonds-appraisal.html): Valuations for bond and surety purposes

## Related Site

- [date-of-death.com](https://www.date-of-death.com): Dedicated resource for date of death appraisals, IRS step-up in basis requirements, and retrospective property valuations. Operated by the same appraiser.
